title: Shoe Chat!
body:
# NO MORE CHAT
*(working on updating it to most common versions)*
request versions here: [github issues](https://github.com/PixelInnovation/ShoeChat/issues)

Get rid of chat once and for all,
useful when playing with proximity voice chat where you don't want any chatter.

## Un Modded
